summary: VIP Social Community UI modernization testing complete. All features verified working: gradient header banner, member count (14 active discussions), Live indicator, '+' button opens post modal, Create story button with purple gradient, modernized composer bar, larger post cards with 52px avatars, VIP badges (golden), action bar with bigger icons. Backend API tests all passing (8/8).
critical_code_review_comments: New 'sc' (social community) prefix styles properly implemented around line 3780+
VIP badge implementation (scPostVipBadge) shows golden diamond at 18px with border
Post cards use larger avatars (52px) as specified in scPostAvatar style
Action bar icons at proper size with scPostActionBtn styling
data-testid attributes present but React Native Web may not render them as standard HTML data attributes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing VIP user and posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP Social Community modernization fully tested. All new 'sc' prefix styles working. The section displays at /vip/hub under 'Social' tab. Features verified: gradient header (cyan #06B6D4), member count, Live indicator, create story button (purple gradient), composer bar, larger post cards (52px avatars, 16px text), VIP badges (golden diamond), action bar with heart/comment/share/bookmark. Backend APIs: GET /api/vip/social/feed, POST /api/vip/social/posts/{id}/like, GET /api/vip/stories all working correctly.
